nasb.text: For so the Lord has commanded us, ‘I have placed You as a light for the Gentiles, That You may bring salvation to the end of the earth.’ ”

esv.text: For so the Lord has commanded us, saying, “‘I have made you a light for the Gentiles, that you may bring salvation to the ends of the earth.’”

cnv.text: 因為主曾這樣吩咐我們說： ‘我已立你作外族人的光， 使你把救恩帶到地極去。’”

ccb.text: 因为主这样吩咐我们， “‘我已使你成为外族人的光， 好把救恩带到地极。’”

csbs.text: 因为主是这样吩咐我们的： ‘我已经指派你为外邦人的光， 使你把救恩带到地极。’  ”
